name: Ankur Large (Puppy) Saucer 37cm (3500ml)
shortDescription: The Ankur Large Saucer Bowl is the perfect feeding solution for your growing pet. With a spacious 37 cm diameter and a generous 3500 ml capacity, this bowl is designed to accommodate even the thirstiest of dogs
description: The Ankur Large Puppy Saucer Bowl is the perfect feeding solution for your growing pup. With a spacious 37 cm diameter and a generous 3500 ml capacity, this bowl is designed to accommodate even the thirstiest of puppies. Key Features: Generous Size: Ideal for larger breeds or multiple pets, ensuring ample space for food or water. Durable Material: Made from high-quality, pet-safe materials for long-lasting use. Easy to Clean: Smooth surface makes it simple to rinse and maintain hygiene. Stylish Design: Sleek and modern look that complements any home decor. Keep your furry friend happy and well-fed with the Ankur Large Puppy Saucer Bowl!
